name: Get Asset Content
description: Retrieves the binary content payload of an asset by any resolvable address (hex hash, /a/, /o/, /v/, DID URL, workspace path). Content is returned as a hex-encoded Blob. Returns {truncated: true, size} if the payload exceeds maxSize (default 1MB). Use asset_get for metadata. Note: only assets that were stored with a content payload have content — non-CAS workspace values return exists: false here.

id.description: Asset reference. Any resolvable address: hex hash, /a/<hash>, /o/<name>, /v/<path>, DID URL, or workspace path (w/, g/, j/, etc.).

maxSize.description: Maximum content size in bytes (default 1000000). If exceeded, returns truncated: true with the size.

exists.description: True if a CAS record was found for the resolved asset

value.description: Content as hex-encoded Blob (0x...). Present when exists is true and not truncated.

size.description: Content size in bytes (present when truncated)
